roa.docketEntryComment: PD TO SET MOT TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE, PC 1538,5 FILED

/CAL:DISPOSITION/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/SATERM/CTORD:EFFECTIVE TODAY, THE PROTECTIVE ORDER IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED CASE, ISSUED ON 05-07-21 AND RESTRAINING PAUL TEED FROM ENTERING THE AREA BOUNDED BY POST ST, KEARNYST, 3RD ST, HOWARD ST AND 10TH ST IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA, IS TERMINATED/ /EMTERM/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT, TO SET MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 08-30-21/987,2/CONTD: TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:CHRISTINA HAYES, SFPD/X:THE PEOPLE DISMISS COUNT 2 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE PRIOR TO THE HOLDING/  /HTA1:1/X:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION LISTED IN THE COMPLAINT TO BE TRUE/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 6-21-21/X: 60TH DAY IS 7-6-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE/ AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/SA4: AREAS BOUNDED BY POST ST, KEARNEYST, 3RD ST, HOWARD ST, 10TH ST AND POLK ST/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, DEF MTS, LD 08-30-21/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 19/TRANS 19:FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
